LightningComponentBundle.description: Shows a button that resolves a Prompt Builder template for the current record and displays the generated response.

property.name: cardTitle
property.label: Card Title
property.description: Heading shown at the top of the card.

property.name: helpText
property.label: Help Text
property.default: Generate an AI summary of this record.
property.description: Short instruction shown before the response is generated.

property.name: iconName
property.label: Card Icon
property.description: SLDS icon name shown in the card header, e.g. standard:account.

property.name: templateName
property.label: Prompt Template API Name
property.description: Developer name of the prompt template to resolve.

property.name: inputParameterName
property.label: Template Input Name
property.description: Reference name of the record input the template expects, e.g. Input:Account.
